page.main: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 pt-28 pb-20
page.breadcrumbNav: mt-6 mb-8 text-xs sm:text-sm text-[var(--ggc-muted)] uppercase tracking-wide
page.headerImageWrap: relative h-[240px] sm:h-[280px] mb-6 overflow-hidden rounded-lg
page.headerOverlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-black/60 via-transparent to-transparent
page.headerTitleOnImage: absolute bottom-5 left-0 right-0 text-[clamp(1.5rem,4vw,1.875rem)] font-semibold text-white px-4 font-display
page.mobileFilterBtn: w-full flex items-center justify-center gap-2 px-4 py-3 bg-[var(--ggc-primary)] text-white text-sm font-medium rounded-lg hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity duration-150
page.overlay: fixed inset-0 bg-black bg-opacity-50 z-40 hidden lg:hidden
page.sidebar: w-full lg:w-72 flex-shrink-0 fixed lg:relative top-0 left-0 h-full lg:h-auto bg-[var(--ggc-bg)] border-r border-[var(--ggc-border)] z-40 lg:z-auto transform -translate-x-full lg:translate-x-0 transition-transform duration-300 ease-in-out lg:block
page.filterSidebarRoot: bg-[var(--ggc-bg)] rounded-lg shadow-sm border border-[var(--ggc-border)] p-6
page.sortDropdownSelect: appearance-none bg-[var(--ggc-bg)] border border-[var(--ggc-border)] rounded-md px-4 py-2 pr-8 text-sm font-medium text-[var(--ggc-text)] hover:border-[var(--ggc-accent)] focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[var(--ggc-accent)] focus:border-transparent transition-colors duration-150 cursor-pointer
page.topBar: flex flex-col sm:flex-row items-start sm:items-center justify-between gap-3 mb-6
page.viewToggleGroup: flex items-center gap-0.5 rounded-lg border border-[var(--ggc-border)] p-0.5 bg-[var(--ggc-surface)]
page.mobileCount: text-xs text-[var(--ggc-muted)] uppercase tracking-wide mb-4 sm:hidden
page.productGrid: grid grid-cols-2 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4 sm:gap-5 lg:gap-6 items-start collection-product-grid
page.loadMoreBtn: bg-[var(--ggc-bg)] border border-[var(--ggc-border)] text-[var(--ggc-text)] px-6 py-3 rounded-md hover:bg-[var(--ggc-surface)] hover:border-[var(--ggc-accent)] transition-all duration-200 font-medium
page.paginationPrev: px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-150 bg-[var(--ggc-surface)] border border-[var(--ggc-border)] text-[var(--ggc-text)] hover:bg-[var(--ggc-border)]
page.paginationNext: px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors duration-150 bg-[var(--ggc-surface)] border border-[var(--ggc-border)] text-[var(--ggc-text)] hover:bg-[var(--ggc-border)]
